items.title_en: Trump administration to loan $17 billion to speed deployment of 10 big nuclear reactors in U.S.
items.title_zh: 特朗普政府将贷款170亿美元加速美国10座大型核反应堆的部署
items.desc_en: The loans will support the construction of five projects that each host two big nuclear reactors.
items.desc_zh: 这些贷款将支持五个项目的建设，每个项目都有两个大型核反应堆。

items.title_en: Progressive Brad Lander’s surging bid for Congress splinters Democrats' labor union alliance
items.title_zh: 进步派布拉德·兰德(Brad Lander)大幅竞选国会议员导致民主党工会联盟分裂
items.desc_en: Rep. Dan Goldman, D-N.Y., is fighting for his political life in a race with Brad Lander, who is backed by Mayor Zohran Mamdani and Sen. Bernie Sanders, I-Vt.
items.desc_zh: 纽约州民主党众议员丹·戈德曼 (Dan Goldman) 正在与布拉德·兰德 (Brad Lander) 争夺政治生命，后者得到了市长佐兰·马姆达尼 (Zohran Mamdani) 和佛蒙特州参议员伯尼·桑德斯 (Bernie Sanders) 的支持。

items.title_en: Factory job cuts in June neared financial crisis and Covid levels, S&P says
items.title_zh: 标准普尔表示，六月份工厂裁员接近金融危机和新冠疫情水平
items.desc_en: Though the firm's manufacturing index ran better than expected for June, it came largely from an inventory rebuild and despite sharp job cuts.
items.desc_zh: 尽管该公司 6 月份的制造业指数好于预期，但主要来自库存重建和大幅裁员。

items.title_en: Sen. Cassidy plans to push 'big idea' for Social Security reform in last days in office
items.title_zh: 参议员卡西迪计划在任期的最后几天推动社会保障改革的“伟大想法”
items.desc_en: As Social Security faces an imminent funding shortfall, Sen. Bill Cassidy said he has come up with a plan to invest in the stock market on the program's behalf.
items.desc_zh: 由于社会保障面临迫在眉睫的资金短缺，参议员比尔·卡西迪表示，他已提出代表该计划投资股市的计划。

items.desc_zh: Valve表示，其PC-控制台混合体的成本反映了组件成本随着时间的推移而上升的更广泛趋势。

items.title_en: UN commission of inquiry says Israel committing genocide in Gaza by deliberately targeting children
items.title_zh: 联合国调查委员会称以色列故意针对儿童在加沙实施种族灭绝
items.desc_en: Israel rejects the new report by the three-member expert panel, calling it a "libellous sham".
items.desc_zh: 以色列拒绝接受三人专家小组的新报告，称其为“诽谤性的骗局”。

items.title_en: Drowning deaths soar in France as Europe buckles in peak of heatwave
items.title_zh: 欧洲遭遇热浪高峰，法国溺水死亡人数激增
items.desc_en: Forty people have drowned in heatwave-related deaths in France since last Thursday, Prime Minister Sébastien Lecornu says.
items.desc_zh: 法国总理塞巴斯蒂安·勒科尔努表示，自上周四以来，法国已有 40 人因热浪而溺水身亡。

items.title_en: Oracle sheds 21,000 roles over the past year amid wave of AI layoffs from tech giants
items.title_zh: 科技巨头人工智能裁员浪潮中，甲骨文去年裁员 21,000 人
items.desc_en: "The adoption and deployment of AI technologies across our operations have resulted, and may continue to result, in reductions to our workforce," Oracle said.
items.desc_zh: 甲骨文表示：“在我们的运营中采用和部署人工智能技术已经并可能继续导致我们的员工人数减少。”

items.title_en: Trump anticipates better relationship with Colombia under new leader
items.title_zh: 特朗普预计新领导人领导下与哥伦比亚关系会更好
items.desc_en: Abelardo de la Espriella, who preliminary results suggest is Colombia's next president, had Trump's endorsement.
items.desc_zh: 初步结果显示，阿韦拉多·德拉埃斯普里埃拉将成为哥伦比亚下一任总统，他得到了特朗普的支持。

items.title_en: Spider which uses spring trap to capture prey discovered in Australia
items.title_zh: 澳大利亚发现蜘蛛利用弹簧陷阱捕捉猎物
items.desc_en: Researchers say their hunting method - which allows them to prey on dangerous ants - is unprecedented.
items.desc_zh: 研究人员表示，它们的狩猎方法——这使得它们能够捕食危险的蚂蚁——是前所未有的。

items.title_en: Five things to watch in Tuesday's primaries as New York races take center stage
items.title_zh: 随着纽约竞选成为焦点，周二初选有五件事值得关注
items.desc_en: Tuesday’s primaries in New York, Maryland and Utah test outside money, party power and the influence of Zohran Mamdani and Donald Trump.
items.desc_zh: 周二在纽约、马里兰州和犹他州举行的初选将考验外部资金、政党权力以及佐兰·马姆达尼和唐纳德·特朗普的影响力。

items.title_en: Montreal shooting leaves officer, civilian and suspect dead
items.title_zh: 蒙特利尔枪击事件造成警官、平民和嫌疑人死亡
items.desc_en: It was the first time in 24 years that a Montreal police officer was  killed in the line of duty, the city's police chief said.
items.desc_zh: 蒙特利尔市警察局长表示，这是 24 年来首次有一名警察在执行任务时被杀。

items.title_en: Ransom note claims Nancy Guthrie died after abduction
items.title_zh: 勒索信声称南希·格思里在绑架后死亡
items.desc_en: The note from the possible kidnappers reportedly stated that they did not mean for her to die and included an apology to the family.
items.desc_zh: 据报道，可能的绑架者在信中表示，他们并不是故意要她死，并向家人道歉。

items.title_en: U.S. issues sweeping Iran oil sanctions waivers, unlocking billions in revenue for Tehran
items.title_zh: 美国全面豁免伊朗石油制裁，为德黑兰释放数十亿美元的收入
items.desc_en: The U.S. issued a sweeping rollback of sanctions on Iranian oil, offering Tehran an economic lifeline as negotiations toward a peace deal proceed.
items.desc_zh: 美国全面取消对伊朗石油的制裁，为德黑兰提供了一条经济生命线，以推动和平协议谈判的进行。

items.title_en: Dettol apologises after ad to clean up 'toxic men' backfires in China
items.title_zh: 滴露清理“毒男”广告在中国适得其反后道歉
items.desc_en: The ad sparked accusations of sexism in China, after featuring a man looking for a partner who is "not tainted by other men".
items.desc_zh: 这则广告在中国引发了性别歧视的指责，广告中一名男子正在寻找“不受其他男人玷污”的伴侣。

items.title_en: Inquiry ordered after building fire kills 15 in north India city
items.title_zh: 印度北部城市建筑起火造成15人死亡后下令进行调查
items.desc_en: Witnesses described people jumping from windows to escape, while rescue teams broke through a wall to save lives.
items.desc_zh: 目击者称，人们从窗户跳下逃生，而救援队则冲破墙壁拯救生命。

items.title_zh: 英国脱欧十年后：图表中英国经济和政治如何变化
